no_changes_rationale:
Bead ddx-90f48012 — federation: hub HTTP API + --hub-mode gating + ts-net policy + version handshake

All four acceptance criteria are already satisfied by code merged in prior beads. No further changes are required in this attempt.

AC mapping → evidence:

1. /api/federation/register, /heartbeat, /deregister endpoints exist
   - cli/internal/server/federation_hub.go:76-79 routes mounted in EnableHubMode:
       POST /api/federation/register   → handleFederationRegister  (lines 188-267)
       POST /api/federation/heartbeat  → handleFederationHeartbeat (lines 273-307)
       GET  /api/federation/spokes     → handleFederationListSpokes (lines 309-318)
       DELETE /api/federation/spokes/{id} → handleFederationDeregister (lines 320-334)

2. --hub-mode flag wired
   - cli/cmd/server.go:157 declares --hub-mode flag
   - cli/cmd/server.go:105-111 invokes srv.EnableHubMode(...) when set
   - Routes are mounted ONLY by EnableHubMode (federation_hub.go:47-80)
   - cli/cmd/server.go:99-101 rejects --federation-allow-plain-http unless --hub-mode

3. ts-net required by default; explicit --federation-allow-plain-http opt-out (warned)
   - Default policy: cli/internal/server/federation_hub.go:122-134 (requireFederationTrusted)
     rejects non-loopback / non-ts-net peers with 403 unless allowPlainHTTP=true.
   - WARN per accepted plain-HTTP registration: federation_hub.go:253-259
   - Startup banner WARN: cli/cmd/server.go:108-110

4. Version handshake at registration: reject incompatible major; degrade compatible-but-newer
   - cli/internal/federation/handshake.go (Handshake function)
     - schema mismatch → reject (reason "schema_mismatch")
     - major mismatch → reject (reason "ddx_major_mismatch")
     - newer minor/patch (same major) → accept as StatusDegraded ("degraded_newer_minor")
   - Invoked at registration time: federation_hub.go:204-211

5. Tests cover all four behaviors — cli/internal/server/federation_hub_test.go
   - Endpoints: TestFederationRoutesMountedInHubMode (line 81),
     TestFederationListAndDeregister (line 290), TestFederationHeartbeatActivatesSpoke (line 259)
   - --hub-mode gating: TestFederationRoutesNotMountedWithoutHubMode (line 59)
   - ts-net policy: TestFederationStrictDefaultRefusesPlainHTTP (line 162),
     TestFederationPlainHTTPOptOutEmitsWarn (line 171),
     TestFederationLoopbackDoesNotEmitPlainHTTPWarn (line 196)
   - Version handshake: TestFederationRegisterVersionMajorMismatchRejected (line 208),
     TestFederationRegisterSchemaMismatchRejected (line 224),
     TestFederationRegisterNewerMinorAcceptedDegraded (line 240)

Verification: all 16 federation hub tests pass on the current base revision.

verification_command: cd cli && go test -run 'TestFederation' ./internal/server/ -count=1
